/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sysThreadTest.dir/TestThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sysThreadTest.dir/threadTest.cpp.o -o ../../bin/sysThreadTest  ../../lib/libAppUtils.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libSysUtils.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a -lrt -ldl
